CIPHER.1443.cipherString: One could not always have safety as the foremost goal. Do that, and who would ever achieve anything of note?
CIPHER.1443.question: Jack McDevitt offers an observation that has been encoded as an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.1443.author: Jack McDevitt

CIPHER.1444.cipherString: Those who lack the courage will always find a philosophy to justify it.
CIPHER.1444.question: Projected by a broken laser pointer during physics class, solve this Checkerboard quote from Albert Camus with a polybius key of PITCHERS. What does it say?
CIPHER.1444.author: Albert Camus

CIPHER.1445.cipherString: Bunsen was no theorist, and purely speculative questions had little or no interest for him.
CIPHER.1445.question: A riddle is discovered taped under a chemistry lab bench. It's a quote, encrypted as a K1 Aristocrat. You are also told that the first word is a person's last name (you have heard the name before in science class). What does it say?

CIPHER.1446.cipherString: Education enables people and societies to be what they can be.
CIPHER.1446.question: Your smart fridge started flashing this cryptic message at 3 a.m. It's by Bill Richardson encoded in a Nihilist Substitution with a keyword of GLORY and polybius key of GOLDFISHES. What does it say?
CIPHER.1446.author: Bill Richardson

CIPHER.1447.cipherString: Pain reaches the heart with electrical speed, but truth moves to the heart as slowly as a glacier.
CIPHER.1447.question: Someone left a paper with the message below on the copy machine in the office. It's a quote by Barbara Kingsolver, encoded as an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.1447.author: Barbara Kingsolver

CIPHER.1448.cipherString: True happiness is not found in people, places, or things. It is found in our own hearts.
CIPHER.1448.question: Etched into the surface of a melted vinyl record, you found this Checkerboard-encrypted quote by Avijeet Das with a polybius key of NIGHTMARE. What does it say?
CIPHER.1448.author: Avijeet Das

CIPHER.1449.cipherString: El problema con ella es que carece de la capacidad de conversación, pero no de la capacidad de hablar.
CIPHER.1449.question: A coded message is discovered inside a fortune cookie. It turns out to be a quote by George Bernard Shaw in Spanish, encoded using a Xenocrypt Cipher using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains ELLA. What does it say?
CIPHER.1449.author: George Bernard Shaw
CIPHER.1449.translation: The trouble with her is that she lacks the power of conversation but not the power of speech.

CIPHER.1450.cipherString: Acting is magical. Change your look and your attitude, and you can be anyone.
CIPHER.1450.question: A mysterious postcard arrives from an unknown sender. It contains a coded quote by Alicia Witt, written in a Porta using a keyword of BRICK. What does it say?
CIPHER.1450.author: Alicia Witt

CIPHER.1451.cipherString: There is nothing more beautiful than cheerfulness in an old face, and among country people it is always a sign of a well-regulated life.
CIPHER.1451.question: You stumble across this encoded text on an old floppy disk labeled “Project Discovery.” It's a quote by Richter encoded as a Patristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher ends with LIFE. What does it say?
CIPHER.1451.author: Richter

CIPHER.1452.cipherString: Knowledge is the food of the soul.
CIPHER.1452.question: The message below was encoded into the DNA sequence of a synthetic organism. It translates to a quote by Plato, encrypted using an Affine Cipher with a=21 and b=23. What does it say?
CIPHER.1452.author: Plato

CIPHER.1453.cipherString: There is not enough time to do all the nothing we want to do.
CIPHER.1453.question: Your solar-powered calculator started flashing this Baconian sequence—it's Bill Watterson's words. What does it say?
CIPHER.1453.author: Bill Watterson

CIPHER.1454.cipherString: Failure implies a failed day not a failed life.
CIPHER.1454.question: Your graphing calculator won’t stop displaying this Fractionated Morse puzzle by Amit Kalantri. You are told that the quote starts with FAILU. What does it say?
CIPHER.1454.author: Amit Kalantri

CIPHER.1455.cipherString: At some point, you just pull off the Band-Aid and it hurts, but then it's over and you're relieved.
CIPHER.1455.question: Your smart fridge started flashing this cryptic message at 3 a.m. It's by John Green encoded in an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains OFF. What does it say?
CIPHER.1455.author: John Green

CIPHER.1456.cipherString: When I don't understand, I have an unbearable itch to know why.
CIPHER.1456.question: A time-capsule USB drive from 1983 just auto-opened with this Nihilist Substitution-encrypted message by Robert A. Heinlein with a keyword of TRIPLE and polybius key of FACTORIES. What does it say?
CIPHER.1456.author: Robert A. Heinlein

CIPHER.1457.cipherString: It's amazing how stress keeps you trim.
CIPHER.1457.question: You receive this cryptic message from the future through an online time capsule. It's a quote by Peter Andre, written in a Baconian. You are told that the cipher text DRUMS EVERY MONTH FUZZY decodes to be SAMA. What does it say?
CIPHER.1457.author: Peter Andre

CIPHER.1458.question: Your microscope slide prep strangely revealed this Cryptarithm message. What do the values 4622863 723512 9503 decode to?

CIPHER.1459.cipherString: I have a vest. If I had my arms cut off, it would be a jacket.
CIPHER.1459.question: A mysterious app update added this Baconian lock screen—it's actually Mitch Hedberg's quote. What does it say?
CIPHER.1459.author: Mitch Hedberg

CIPHER.1460.cipherString: Success without honor is an unseasoned dish it will satisfy your hunger, but it won't taste good.
CIPHER.1460.question: You find a coded sequence scratched into the surface of a lab stool. It turns out to be a quote by Joe Paterno, written in a Complete Columnar. The quote has ONOR somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.1460.author: Joe Paterno

CIPHER.1461.cipherString: He that despairs measures Providence by his own little contracted model.
CIPHER.1461.question: Someone left this encrypted quote scribbled on the chalkboard before class began. It's a quote, written as an Atbash. What does it say?

CIPHER.1462.cipherString: Not everything in life is achievable by a straight path.
CIPHER.1462.question: Someone passed you a piece of paper with this Complete Columnar encoded quote by Priyanka Agarwal. The quote has IFEISAC somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.1462.author: Priyanka Agarwal

CIPHER.1463.cipherString: Science consists exactly of those forms of knowledge that can be verified and duplicated by anybody.
CIPHER.1463.question: You receive an anonymous text message containing a coded passage. It's said to be a quote by Seth Lloyd, encrypted with a Caesar. What does it say?
CIPHER.1463.author: Seth Lloyd

CIPHER.1464.cipherString: Doubt can only be removed by action.
CIPHER.1464.question: Your smart fridge started flashing this cryptic message at 3 a.m. It's by Johann Wolfgang von Goethe encoded in an Affine with a=5 and b=18. What does it say?
CIPHER.1464.author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe

CIPHER.1465.cipherString: Knowledge teaches me to run, but wisdom teaches me to walk.
CIPHER.1465.question: You receive this puzzling text during a live science broadcast. It contains a quote by Anthony T. Hincks, encrypted as a Fractionated Morse. You are told that the quote has OWLEDG in it corresponding to the encoded text W L K B E V A G, meaning A = ●×–; B = ●–●; E = ●×●; G = –●×; K = ––×; L = –×●; V = ×–●; W = ×––. What does it say?
CIPHER.1465.author: Anthony T. Hincks

CIPHER.1466.question: Your lab partner discovered this pattern on the back of a graphing calculator. It's a quote, encoded as a Cryptarithm. What do the values 8001 4558 72457 92316 decode to?

CIPHER.1467.cipherString: There is always room for improvement, always. Everything can be improved.
CIPHER.1467.question: Archaeologists unearth a stone tablet inscribed with a message. It's a quote by Mapi León encoded as a Porta using a keyword of RUBY. What does it say?
CIPHER.1467.author: Mapi León

CIPHER.1495.cipherString: I thought I could bring an end to the world's suffering. But when every equation was solved, all that remained were fields of dreamless solitude.
CIPHER.1495.question: This quote by Viktor in Arcane has been encoded as an Aristocrat for you to solve.

CIPHER.1496.cipherString: You know what I never understood? Genies. They tell you to wish for whatever you want but then they add some terrible twist.
CIPHER.1496.question: An old prototype suddenly prints this encoded text. It's a quote from Dr. Doofenshmirtz, encrypted as a Patristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the ciphertext letters QFU TJ on the first line correspond to the plaintext UNDER. What does it say?
